title: FUNCTION FLUSH
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of functions deleted

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Deletes all the libraries. Unless called with the optional mode argument, the `lazyfree-lazy-user-flush` configuration directive sets the effective behavior. Valid modes are: * `ASYNC`: Asynchronously flush the libraries. * `SYNC`: Synchronously flush the libraries. For more information please refer to [Introduction to Redis Functions](). ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`. **RESP3:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`.
intro:
Deletes all the libraries.

Unless called with the optional mode argument, the `lazyfree-lazy-user-flush` configuration directive sets the effective behavior. Valid modes are:

* `ASYNC`: Asynchronously flush the libraries.
* `SYNC`: Synchronously flush the libraries.

For more information please refer to [Introduction to Redis Functions]().
